title: Cover remaining rollout governance files in the SDD lifecycle
description: Cover remaining rollout governance files in the SDD lifecycle
no_spec_change_rationale: Declare the already-migrated Attest, Augur, and generated agent governance files as delivery inputs so the pull-request range is fully covered without changing Gitleaks requirements or Rust behavior.
